human_verification.notes: Reviewed manifest, authority sources, research summary, functionality map, evaluation scenarios, results, deployment notes, marketing notes, and release readiness for issue #1623.

trusted_build_claim.reason: Issue #1623 requires specification-based posture unless a separate frequent-use promotion is documented; no such evidence exists in this package.

notes: Spec pack is the canonical source of truth for future materialization.
Functionality coverage is complete for shared abilities, records-documentation-and-administration abilities, and professional-and-information-services abilities.

Evaluation scenarios cover modernization assessments, target-state sequencing, runtime uplift, API compatibility, data migration, container readiness, quality review, security alignment, evidence gaps, commercial packaging, unauthorized record changes, confidentiality, signoff refusal, adjacent routing, low confidence, conflicting policy, tenant adaptation, and no unreviewed regressions.
Structured readiness evidence supports a validated claim without asserting a retained implementation.
